---
title: "Toward Trustworthy Learning and Control in Distributed Intelligent Systems"
author: "Fei Wang, PhD"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: "media/uoft_logo.svg"
  data-background-size: "180px 180px"
  data-background-position: "center bottom"
  data-background-repeat: "no-repeat"
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: theme.scss
        margin: 0.04
        incremental: true  
        code-block-height: 300px
        menu: true
        slide-number: true
execute:
  echo: false
---



{{< include slides/01-intro.md >}}

{{< include slides/02-dlg.md >}}
